tools.name: hash_text
tools.description: Compute a cryptographic hash (md5, sha1, sha256, sha512) of a text.

tools.name: text_stats
tools.description: Analyze text: word/sentence counts, reading time and Flesch readability scores.

tools.name: validate_iban
tools.description: Validate an IBAN (ISO 13616 MOD-97) and return bank/country details.

tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: Validate an email address: RFC syntax, MX records, disposable/role-based detection.

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Look up DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA) for a domain.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert an amount between currencies using current ECB exchange rates.

tools.name: world_time
tools.description: Get the current time and UTC offset for an IANA timezone.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check whether a domain name is available for registration (WHOIS + DNS).

tools.name: geo_audit
tools.description: Run a CiteReady GEO audit: how well can AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) crawl, understand and cite a website. Returns score, grade and actionable findings.
